reports.incident_description: Patient vomited on chair and floor in OPD waiting area; request biohazard clean-up, chair wipe-down, and disinfection around ticket counter.
Light morning rain soaked foyer mats and left water pooling near main entrance; please mop, replace with dry mats, and place wet-floor signs.
Yellow clinical waste bags from Ward 7 were left in the black-bin bay; need re-segregation and disinfection of the bay surface immediately.
Laundry delivered bedsheets with faint iodine stains and still damp; please rewash and supply clean dry sets for evening admissions.
Suspected dengue patient discharged from Isolation Cubicle 3; request terminal cleaning with curtain change per protocol before next admission.
Short spell of rain brought mud into Paediatric corridor from the garden side; floors sticky in patches—please deep mop and clean skirting.
Glass bottle of syrup shattered near OPD pharmacy counter; need safe glass removal and disinfection of the sticky spill.
Sharps box near Bed 12 at fill line and no spare in store; please provide replacement and arrange prompt collection of sealed container.
Persistent foul odour from surgical ward sluice room; request deep clean including drain trap and wall tiles before OT list starts.
Evening batch of OT scrub suits smells musty after brief rain; kindly rewash and fast-track drying of 20 sets for night cases.
COVID isolation Room A vacated; terminal clean needed with high-touch disinfection and curtain change before reuse.
Blood spill on floor near ICU Bed 3 during line insertion; please attend immediately with biohazard protocol and change mop heads after use.
Povidone-iodine spilled along OT corridor; floor tacky and slippery—need thorough clean before next patient transfer.
Drizzle from umbrellas left wet patch at CT entrance; request immediate mopping and placement of caution signage.
OPD general waste trolley had two yellow clinical bags mixed in; please re-segregate and disinfect trolley handle surfaces.
Entry mats at ETU remain damp and smell after morning showers; request replacement with dry mats and floor disinfection.
Pigeon droppings on ramp rail and wheelchair bay; kindly clean and disinfect, and liaise with pest control through your team.
Nappy and clinical bins not cleared at 02:00 as per schedule; odour building in SCBU—please collect with double-bagging.
Mop heads stored wet in corridor closet; risk of contamination—please launder/replace and sanitize the storage buckets and area.
Pantry sink overflowed with food debris; water spreading across floor—need immediate clean-up, disinfection, and wet-floor signage (maintenance ticket raised).
Light rain led to muddy shoe prints across registration hall; require continuous mopping until footfall reduces.
Due to evening humidity and showers, dryer cycle left sheets slightly damp; please run extra drying and prioritize 30 bed sets for night shift.
Waste holding room has strong odour after delayed pickup; request interim surface disinfection, ensure bin lids sealed, and improve airflow.
TB isolation Room 2 vacated; please carry out terminal clean including exhaust grill wipe, mattress decontamination, and curtain change.
Coconut gravy and rice spilled near staff dining line; greasy patch is a slip hazard—need degreasing and warning signage.
Post-resus bay has blood splatter on floor and trolley legs; request biohazard clean with 0.5% chlorine before OPD crowd arrives.
Batch of cot sheets from laundry arrived slightly damp with a musty smell in today’s humidity; please rewash/dry and issue replacements.
OPD waiting hall seats and skirting dusty from morning footfall; please wipe surfaces and wet mop the floor.
Airborne isolation Room 2 discharged MDR‑TB patient; need terminal clean including high-touch points and exhaust grille tonight.
AC condensation dripping near Bed 3 has made the area slippery; dry, disinfect and place caution sign.
Light evening rain tracked into OPD foyer; floor wet and slick with bystanders walking through—urgent mopping and signage needed.
Yellow clinical waste bags from Microbiology hold area not collected since morning; nearing overflow, please remove and replace liners.
Tea urn leaked in the pantry; sticky floor attracting ants—request thorough clean and disinfect.
Between cases in Theatre 2, bone cement dust and debris on floor; require rapid scrub per OT protocol before next patient.
Food waste found in clinical (yellow) bin; please replace the bag and place clear segregation signage at bin area.
After the thundery rain, water leaked at theatre link corridor; floor hazardous—immediate mopping and wet-floor boards requested.
OT gowns received this evening have visible stains on cuffs; please reprocess and issue a clean set urgently.
SCBU isolation cubicle vacated; request terminal clean including incubator exterior, walls and touch points before 11:00.
Fine dust on records room shelving and file tops; need detailed wipe-down to prevent contamination of documents.
Sharps container in sluice room has reached the fill line; please replace container and collect the full one.
OPD–X-ray link corridor has sand and dust tracked in; one patient slipped earlier—sweep, wet mop and place mats.
After morning drizzle, muddy footprints at main lobby entrance; need immediate mopping and additional floor mats.
Clinical waste holding room smelling strong in afternoon heat; please arrange prompt removal and washdown of the area.
Running short of clean baby wraps and sheets; kindly expedite laundry supply to labour room.
Rehab gym floor has powdery dust; gait training ongoing—request wet mopping now.
Toilets in male surgical smell despite morning clean; please do deep clean with disinfectant and restock supplies.
Linen return short by 10 bedsheets from yesterday’s issue; kindly reconcile and supply replacements.
Gusty breeze blew dry leaves and grit across OPD walkway after brief rain; need sweeping, mopping and caution signs.
Greasy water spill near canteen corridor to ward lifts; immediate degreasing and wet-floor signage required.
Alcohol hand-rub dispenser leaked onto injection room floor; area slippery—please clean and check surrounding splash zones.
Linen store feels damp due to humidity; several sheets clammy. Request re-drying and shelf wipe-down.
Heavy rain tracked mud inside OPD entrance; floor slippery. Need immediate mopping and wet-floor signs.
Rain seeped into corridor by Ward 6; bin liners wet and labels smudged. Replace liners and sanitize area.
Dengue-suspect room vacated. Please do terminal clean with chlorine as per IC protocol.
Red bag waste mixed with black bag in ICU sluice room. Immediate re-segregation and area disinfection needed.
Lobby at OPD pharmacy damp from umbrellas after showers. Request continuous mopping and mats.
ORS spill in paeds play corner; floor sticky and ants starting. Need quick clean and surface wipe.
Short of clean infant gowns; laundry delayed after humid spell. Please expedite SCBU batch.
Stairwell B puddle after brief storm; no caution board. Need mop-up and signage immediately.
OPD toilets require deep clean and restocking; strong odour noted during morning clinic.
MRSA-contact room discharged. Request chlorine terminal cleaning and curtain change.
Small blood spill in ETU triage corridor. Need spill kit clean-up and area disinfection now.
Radiology waiting bins overflowing from morning rush; request collection and seat wipe-down.
Theatre cloth gowns returned slightly damp. Please re-dry and press before first list.
Leak at Medical Ward stair landing after storm; floor slick. Need urgent mop and cordon.
TB isolation bed vacated. Request terminal clean with approved disinfectant and UV cycle.
Yellow bags left in corridor >2 hours. Please remove immediately and sanitize floor area.
Drip from OPD roof near token counter after storm; floor wet. Need absorbent mats and mopping.
Wind blew leaves and litter into ambulance bay. Request sweeping and bio-waste bin check.
Preparing isolation bed for suspected dengue. Need bleach clean and mosquito net laundering.
Soiled linen cart parked near nurses’ station; odour noticeable. Please remove and wipe floor.
Post-rain muddy footprints along main corridor; two near-slips. Urgent dry mopping and signage.
Postnatal ward short of clean bedsheets after night discharges. Request priority laundry drop.
Yellow bins in minor theatre nearly full; please collect and replace liners before afternoon list.
Entrance mats soaked from light morning rain. Need dry replacements and routine mopping.
Blood drip after cannulation spilled on OPD Injection Room floor; need biohazard clean and chlorine wipe per SOP.
Main entrance mats soaked from rain; patients tracking water. Request immediate dry mopping and replacement dry mats.
Evening thunderstorm caused a corridor leak near Ward 3; floor slippery. Please mop and place caution boards urgently.
Batch of bed sheets returned slightly damp due to humidity. Please re-dry and hot-wash for odour control.
OPD foyer muddy after downpour; need thorough mopping and surface disinfection of seating area.
Side room 5 (suspected TB) vacated; require terminal clean with approved disinfectant before new admission.
Sluice room floor in MICU flooded after storm; foul water present. Need chlorination and deep clean now.
Gym mats sweaty between sessions; mid-day wipe-down missed. Request immediate disinfection.
Brief downpour left mud on ambulance ramp; stretchers carrying dirt into ETU. Need pressure wash and disinfection.
Soiled linen bags colour mix-up noted (red with yellow). Please re-segregate and remind pickup staff.
Blood spill trail from OT 2 to recovery due to trolley wheel; require immediate biohazard clean and signage.
After heavy rain the basement corridor near CSSD is damp; deploy dehumidifiers and dry mopping to prevent mould.
Amniotic fluid spill outside LR scrub area; need chlorine cleaning before morning list.
Storm brought leaves and debris into OPD courtyard; bins overflowing. Request sweeping and waste removal.
Mould patches on ceiling corners; humidity high. Please clean with antifungal agent and wipe vents.
USG room couch stained after gel and contrast spill; sanitize bed and change roll papers promptly.
Short thunder shower made ETU ambulance entry slick; need continuous mopping and wet-floor boards.
Yellow biomedical waste bags piling in lab sluice; scheduled pickup missed and nearing overflow.
Two beds soiled with stool after night shift; request mattress deep clean and urgent linen change to laundry.
Isolation Room 2 (VRE positive) discharged after evening storm; need terminal clean tonight as per contact precautions.
Food waste bins by canteen overflowing; flies observed. Request immediate removal and area disinfection.
Thunderstorm seepage at rear stairwell; steps wet and muddy. Need mopping, caution signs, and fresh mats.
Ward 6 cleaning cart missing 0.5% chlorine and clean mops; please replenish to meet IPC round requirements.
Yellow bag with body fluid leak from NICU tore in transit; need spill cleanup, re-bagging, and trolley disinfection.
Late storm spiked humidity in drying room; theatre gowns not drying, slight musty smell. Request rewash and overnight drying.
OPD foyer floor wet from early rain; two near-slips observed. Request continuous mopping, wet-floor cones, and fresh coir mats at the main entrance.
Curtains along the window bays feel damp and musty after the downpour. Please remove and send for hot wash; wipe sills with hypochlorite.
Torrential rain tracked red mud into corridor from verandah. Need auto-scrubber pass and disinfection; place caution signs.
Yellow clinical waste bag in Minor OT is over 3/4 full and unsealed. Replace immediately and refresh colour-coding labels.
Post-resus blood spill at ETU Bed 6. Require biohazard clean per protocol with chlorine-based disinfectant and proper PPE.
Clean linen shortage at ICU due to delayed laundry. Need 12 draw sheets and 10 pillow covers before morning rounds.
Isolation room for scabies patient is vacated. Request terminal clean, mattress steam, and curtain change before next case.
Lift lobby floors getting wet from dripping umbrellas during showers. Please deploy absorbent mats and assign spot-mopping.
Yellow bin lids in Ward 2 sticky with residue; mild odour noted. Swap out bins, wipe down area, and replace liners.
Sterile OT drapes were mixed with general linen on the return trolley. Segregate immediately and rewash on sterile cycle.
Clinical waste holding room floor requires deep clean and deodorizing; drain smell reported. Schedule after-hours.
With rain and crowding, OPD toilets are muddy and wet. Increase cleaning rounds to every 30 minutes and restock tissue.
Curry spilled near the pantry sink; ants already forming a trail. Request prompt clean and food-safe surface disinfection.
Soiled linen bags left in corridor awaiting lift. Please remove to dirty utility and sanitize the floor where bags rested.
Part of the linen delivery is damp with a musty smell. Rewash on hot cycle and ensure complete drying before reissue.
Dengue isolation cubicle vacated. Request terminal clean with 0.1% chlorine, including bed rails, curtains, and monitor leads.
Used swabs and small vials found in black bin. Housekeeping to swap bins to yellow/red and add bilingual segregation labels.
Mud tracked into the play area after morning rain. Need floor scrub and child-safe disinfection before the 10:30 session.
Returned gowns show visible stains; QA stamp missing. Please reprocess and verify before next list.
Several bed curtains smell damp after today’s rain. Kindly remove, launder, and hang clean spares tonight.
Stairwell A has cobwebs and dusty handrails. Request high-dusting and wipe-down before visiting hours.
Lift lobby puddles persisting with rain; parents nearly slipped. Need mats, cones, and frequent mopping till showers ease.
Low on bedspreads and baby blankets; laundry pickups delayed by downpour. Request emergency supply from backup stock.
Ambulance bay has muddy slush blown in by overnight wind and rain. Please pressure-wash and disinfect to stop tracking into ETU.
Patient vomit in corridor near pharmacy; area cordoned. Require immediate biohazard clean and odour control.
Heavy morning downpour soaked the entrance mats; muddy water tracked into OPD foyer creating slip risk. Request immediate mopping and wet-floor cones.
After the evening burst of rain, water seepage along the CT corridor has left a long slick strip. Need drying, absorbent barriers, and caution signage.
High humidity causing condensation under ICU lobby AC; small puddle forming at doorway. Please dry and monitor.
Ambulance bay entrance pooled with rainwater and mud after sudden shower. Require wet vacuuming and replacement of soaked mats.
Thunderstorm leak on stair between 2nd–3rd floors; steps wet and slippery. Need urgent mopping and cordoning.
Gusty wind blew dust and leaves into OPD waiting chairs and counters. Please sweep and disinfect before next token batch.
Due to humidity, dryers underperforming; surgical sheets delivered damp. Require rewash and urgent replacement to theatre complex.
Brief downpour left puddle at staff entrance to Labour Room; area slippery. Need mopping and cones now.
Heavy rain tracked into ETU triage; floor muddy near resus bay. Immediate deep clean needed to keep area safe.
Dengue isolation room 5 discharged. Please perform terminal cleaning with 0.5% chlorine and surface sterilization as per SOP.
Yellow biomedical waste bin outside OT is overfilled; bags touching lid. Arrange immediate removal and disinfection of bay.
Windows left open for breeze; dust on sills, registration counter, and weighing scale. Need thorough dusting and wipe-down.
Dripping umbrellas from morning drizzle left wet patches at pharmacy queue line. Please mop and place extra mats.
Soiled gauze and tubing found in black bag; segregation error. Rebag to yellow and sanitize waste area floor.
After brief heavy rain, mud streaks on pre-op corridor floor. Need rapid mop and disinfect before next patient transfer.
Fresh sheets from laundry arrived with visible stains on two bundles. Request immediate replacement and batch check.
Morning crowd entered during rain; foyer mats saturated and floor slippery. Need continuous mopping and additional matting.
Water dripping near electrical room corridor; housekeeping needed to contain with buckets, dry floor, and mark hazard until maintenance attends.
Musty smell and damp patches in linen store after early downpour. Request airing, dehumidifier use, and disinfectant wipe of shelves.
Broken EDTA tube spilled blood in lab corridor; initial containment done. Need full biohazard cleanup and proper waste disposal.
Passing rain washed silt/leaves into clinical waste holding area; access to cages obstructed. Please clear and disinfect path.
TB-2 patient discharged. Kindly arrange terminal cleaning with hypochlorite and high-touch surface sterilization before new admission.
Child slipped on wet stair near Paed OPD after heavy rain. Immediate drying, cones, and non-slip mats required.
Laundry delivered damp pillowcases with slight odour during busy shift. Request rewash and urgent replacement stock.
Post-noon downpour left steady drip onto dialysis walkway; need cordon, buckets, and frequent mopping to maintain wheelchair access.
High humidity caused condensation; triage bay floor damp and slick. Request dry mopping and wet-floor signs ASAP.
Heavy rain tracked into OPD entrance; mats are waterlogged and floor is slippery. Need dry mats and continuous mopping immediately.
Resus corridor wet after trolley brought in rainwater. Please mop, disinfect, and place warning signs.
Short on cot sheets; last laundry batch returned slightly damp with musty odour. Need dry replacements and rewash.
Main lobby entrance rugs saturated due to steady rain; slip risk for visitors. Kindly replace with dry rugs and assign roving mopping.
Muddy footprints mixed with body fluid near ETU triage. Immediate disinfectant cleaning and bin liner change required.
Terminal clean needed for Isolation Room 2 post C. diff discharge. Use sporicidal protocol and change curtains.
Clinic rush left toilets heavily soiled; tissue and soap finished; yellow-bin liners missing. Need deep clean and restock.
Evening thunderstorm left windowsills damp; corridor smells musty. Please wipe down and run floor dryer.
Infectious waste (yellow bag) mixed into black-bin at plaster room. Urgent re-segregation and bin sanitization needed.
Stairwell from PT to OPD wet from dripping umbrellas. Require absorbent mats, mopping, and warning signs.
Humidity issue: gowns and pillowcases returned from laundry still damp. Please re-dry/rewash before night shift.
OPD public toilets not serviced after morning crowd; floors sticky, bins overflowing, no handwash. Attend urgently.
ICU anteroom floor tacky from disinfectant residue. Request rinse and neutral cleaner before rounds.
Yellow bags not collected per schedule; two nearly full outside Room 5. Need pickup and fresh liners.
Steady rain; puddles forming along clinic corridor as patients enter. Need continuous mopping and cones placed.
Sluice room clinical waste collection missed; containers near capacity. Please clear and sanitize area immediately.
Stool spill under neonatal warmer. Immediate chlorine clean per neonatal protocol and linen change needed.
Ant trail at tray return after juice spill. Request thorough clean of floor and skirting, and disinfection.
Laundry trolleys left in open passage during rain; contents damp. Please rewash and use covered transport.
Color-coded bins placed but no liners available. Kindly provide yellow and black liners before list starts.
Strong mop-water odour and slightly greasy floor; likely incorrect dilution. Please re-mop using correct mix.
Ward linen stock low; several sheets torn. Need urgent replenishment from laundry for morning admissions.
Widespread rain made OPD foyer dangerously slick; signs not yet placed. Require dry mats and continuous mopping now.
Basement corridor wet from rain carried in by stretchers. Please squeegee, mop, and place cones overnight.
Sticky residue near pharmacy queue from a spilled glucose drink; ants visible. Request mopping with disinfectant and pest deterrent.
Light rain brought wet footprints into OPD lobby; tiles are slippery. Need continuous mopping and caution boards.
Two yellow clinical waste bags left in the sluice uncollected since noon; odour building. Please remove and sanitize area.
Fresh linen delivered to ICU beds 3–5 feels damp with a musty smell. Request rewash/dry and immediate replacement.
Rainwater tracked in from veranda; corridor outside Ward 3 has puddles. Please dry and disinfect; slip risk for parents.
Isolation Room 2 (dengue) discharged at 10:50. Terminal cleaning with 0.5% chlorine needed before next admission.
Cockroach sighted near waste holding point by kitchen passage. Request deep clean and disinfection of the area.
Entrance mat soaked after thunder shower; floor is slick. Need dry mats, mopping, and cones.
Mis-segregation at OT scrub area: infectious dressings placed in general waste bin. Re-segregation and bin change required; clean spillover zone.
Soiled linen hampers full from night shift; collection missed. Please clear before morning rounds to prevent cross-contamination.
Post-drizzle, Stairwell B has muddy prints on treads and landing. Kindly scrub and place caution signs.
Drip from bathroom ceiling caused pooling near door; floor needs frequent mopping and area cordoned until maintenance attends.
Persistent odour in waste holding room Level 1. Request scheduled deodorization and wall/floor wipe-down.
Fine dust on OPD counters and chairs after overnight works. Need thorough wipe and HEPA vacuum before clinic opens.
Clean bedsheets running short; last batch not returned from laundry store. Please issue from buffer stock immediately.
Gusty rain blew onto ETU ramp; surface wet and sandy. Keep mopping crew and cones till showers pass.
Leaking biohazard bag on trolley left droplets in Lift 2 lobby. Need containment, chlorine wipe, and floor disinfection urgently.
Chlorhexidine solution spilled outside Minor Theatre 2. Require chemical spill clean with PPE and caution signage.
Due to overnight humidity, towels from dryer batch 1 are still damp. Need re-drying and quick turnaround for clinics.
ATP swab failed on bed rails in Isolation 1 post-clean. Please reclean immediately and repeat swab before admission.
Backflow from janitor closet drain sent grey water into Ward 5 corridor. Need water extraction and disinfection while repairs pending.
Public toilets near ticket counter smell strongly; bins overflowing after morning rush. Please service and restock.
Torn clinical waste liner from Lab left a blood-stained trail toward Lift 3. Biohazard cleanup required along the route.
Heavy rain brought crowd with wet umbrellas; foyer is puddling. Require continuous squeegee work, dry mats, and cones.
Waiting area by car park littered with snack boxes; ants under chairs. Request sweeping and disinfectant wipe-down.
Isolation Room 3 (Ward 5) discharged at 07:30; terminal clean with 1,000 ppm chlorine not started. Next suspected dengue patient waiting.
Red clinical waste bags mixed with black general waste in Ward 8 utility room; one red bag overfilled and torn. Please re-bag, segregate, and sanitize per MoH guidelines.
OT-2 turnover delayed; blood spill under anaesthetic trolley not fully mopped. Immediate bleach clean and waste removal required.
Sluice room floor contaminated after bedpan washer overflow. Need rapid disinfection, drying, and caution signage.
Main OPD entrance mats soaked; several near-slips reported. Replace with dry mats, mop area, and place wet floor signs.
Curtains and window sills damp after afternoon rain; musty odour in Ward 12 bays. Request curtain change and disinfectant wipe-down.
Thunderstorm tracked muddy water into ambulance bay; ETU triage floor wet and dirty. Need immediate mopping and hypochlorite clean.
Today’s linen batch feels damp; a few bedsheets smell musty in Ward 7. Please re-dry/press and replace affected sets.
Ant trail in OPD dispensary pantry after sugary spill. Need thorough clean under cabinets and surface disinfection.
Lift B soiled with vomitus after patient transfer; strong odour. Request biohazard clean and temporary closure until done.
Please carry out scheduled deep clean of dialysis bays and chairs post-session, including drain area sanitization.
Clinical waste holding room has strong odour; bins not rinsed after emptying. Wash bins, disinfect floor, and ensure lids closed.
OPD corridor dripping during heavy rain; water pooling near ticket counter. Continuous mopping and caution signs needed.
Back corridor muddy after storm through side door. Please wet mop and disinfect before night rounds.
Isolation cubicle cleaning log missing chlorine ppm entries for last two cycles. Ensure 1,000 ppm prep and documentation today.
Rainwater blown under loading bay shutter; floor and pallets wet. Need water removal, disinfection, and drying before stock move.
Clean theatre gowns delivered slightly damp. Please re-dry/iron and replace before afternoon list.
Basement clinical waste room with water ingress; red-bag bins in puddles. Pump out water and disinfect floors and pallets.
East stairwell between OPD and Lab slippery from tracked rainwater; no signage. Request mopping and cones immediately.
Bedspace 4 requires curtain change and high-level disinfection after MRSA-positive transfer. Please prioritise before next admission.
Service corridor outside kitchen with foul water from gully overflow. Immediate clean-up, disinfectant wash, and odour control needed.
Staircase by Ward 5 still wet after evening rains; relatives using it. Please dry, place signs, and recheck within the hour.
Covered walkway to ETU has wet leaves and mud patches. Need sweeping, mopping, and anti-slip mats repositioned.
COVID isolation anteroom floor contaminated from leaking sample box. Require full biohazard clean with 1,000 ppm and terminal wipe-down.
Monthly terminal clean of SCBU pending; dust noted above radiant warmers. Need team now as night admissions expected.
OPD lobby floor is sticky from morning humidity and AC drip; needs dry mopping and fresh mats with wet-floor signs.
After the downpour, rainwater and mud tracked into Radiology corridor; pooling near X-ray 2; urgent mopping and caution boards.
Ambulance bay mud washed into ETU triage; patients slipping; require wet-vac and disinfectant mop now.
Strong odour from used dressing bins; please collect biomedical waste and sanitize the room.
Water running down Stairwell C after storm; steps slick; deploy wet-vac and cones immediately.
Main entrance mats are saturated; lobby floor slippery with crowds; need extra mops, blower, and replacement mats.
Soaked yellow clinical-waste bag torn on trolley outside Ward 4 utility; urgent safe re-bagging and area disinfection per protocol.
Block B lift lobby has pooled rainwater; lift users at risk; please dry, disinfect, and place signs.
Isolation Room D3 (post-dengue discharge) requires terminal cleaning before next admission per ICN checklist.
Soiled linen hampers overflowing; rain delay reported; request immediate pickup with covered trolleys.
OPD foyer has muddy footprints after brief shower; please mop, double-mat the entrance, and put signs.
Airborne Isolation A2 vacated (TB suspect moved); need terminal clean including high-touch points and exhaust grills per IC protocol.
Windows leaked during storm; water under beds 12–16; mop and disinfect bed wheels and skirting urgently.
Physio entrance tracked in sand/leaves with storm gusts; sweep and disinfect before morning sessions.
Surgical Ward 2: blood-stained gauze found in black bin; need segregation correction, bin swap, and area wipe; brief the ward attendant.
ICU anteroom floor damp from condensation after storm; request immediate dry mopping and hypochlorite wipe of handles.
Laundry receiving congested; damp soiled linen stacked near clean zone; separate immediately and sanitize floor/racks.
ETU ramp is water-sheeted during squalls; one near-slip at resus door; deploy scrubber, cones, and extra mats.
Basement Records Room smells musty; damp patches after evening storm; need mildew wipe, blower/dehumidifier, and carpet drying.
OPD public toilets flooded due to backflow during storm; close, clean, disinfect, and reopen swiftly.
Labour Room biomedical-waste bins nearing capacity before evening OT list; urgent collection and yellow bag replacement needed.
NICU overhead light casings and monitor arms dusty; request high-dusting with ladder and sterile covers after noon round.
CSSD corridor wet from theatre trolleys returning in rain; please disinfect and dry; replace soaked floor mats.
Radiology ground-floor corridor has active ceiling drip in storm; contain with buckets, cordon, wet-vac, and disinfect.
Ward 5 received damp bed sheets from laundry after power blips; please recall, rewash/dry, and QA before reissue.
Monsoon rain tracked into OPD registration; floor is slick despite mats. Need continuous mopping, coir mats, and wet-floor signs immediately.
Linen cupboard smells musty; several sheets feel damp after last night’s humidity. Please supply dry stock and check laundry drying room.
Yellow infectious-waste bag overfilled and leaking onto sluice room floor. Request 0.5% hypochlorite clean-up and fresh liner/bin replacement.
Patient discharged from Isolation Cubicle 3. Please perform terminal cleaning and disinfection before next admission.
Rainwater dripping into corridor near nurses’ station. Kindly cordon off, place buckets, and keep mopping until maintenance attends.
Small blood spill under Bed 5 contained by staff. Need housekeeping to decontaminate floor per spill SOP and remove contaminated materials.
Soiled-linen trolley overflowing in LR passage. Please collect and replace bags urgently to prevent cross-contamination.
Rain brought mud into X-ray waiting area; floor dirty and slippery. Need scrubber-dryer pass and extra coir mats.
Hot, humid conditions causing strong odour in waste holding room. Request extra collection round and floor disinfection.
Entrance mats soaked during squally rain; a few near-slips noted. Replace mats and maintain continuous mopping and signage.
Rainwater seeped into back corridor; cartons wet. Please remove water, disinfect floor, and clear damp general waste.
Dressing room infectious-waste bin full; sealed sharps box ready for pickup. Kindly replace bins and collect per schedule.
Returned linen slightly damp with detergent odour; two mothers complained of itching. Please re-wash and ensure proper drying.
Blown rain left puddles on Stairwell A (G to 1st). Need urgent mopping and caution signs on both landings.
Isolation Room 2 requires terminal clean after bed transfer. Wipe high-touch points, mop with hypochlorite, and change curtains.
Heavy rain causing foul smell at waste holding bay; fluid noted around yellow bags. Immediate disinfectant washdown and lid checks requested.
Soiled-linen trolley left in corridor; bags not tagged by ward code. Please tag and transfer to laundry now.
Public toilet near pharmacy has a vomit spill. Need spill kit response with chlorine clean and restocking of supplies.
Post-thunderstorm condensation left theatre floor streaky. Require immediate deep clean before next case per OT protocol.
Biomedical waste staging area overcrowded; two sharps boxes stacked. Please organize urgent collection to incinerator and clean the bay.
Leak at pantry created pooling near electrical sockets. Barricade area, place drip trays, and keep floor dry until repairs.
Main entrance muddy after hours of rain. Need continuous wet mopping, extra coir mats, and trilingual caution signs.
Dust on overhead ledges after HVAC work. Request high-level dusting and disinfectant wipe-down after rounds.
Food waste placed into yellow infectious bag by mistake. Please replace bag, correct segregation, and brief ward attendants.
Lift lobby flooded from umbrellas during heavy rain. Need rapid water extraction, blower-drying, and safety cones.
OPD entrance mats are waterlogged after morning rain; puddles forming. Please swap to dry mats, mop area, and place caution signs.
Mud tracked into main lobby near cashier during thunder shower; high slip risk. Request immediate mopping and signage.
Shortage of clean draw sheets after night shifts; laundry delivery pending. Please prioritize linen supply to Ward 3.
Rehab gym floor feels sticky after disinfectant spill. Needs thorough clean before afternoon sessions to avoid falls.
Patient discharged from Isolation Room 2 (MDR risk). Require terminal cleaning with chlorine per ICN protocol before next admission.
Soiled linen bag tore on transfer; trolley and corridor patch contaminated. Need red bag replacements and immediate biohazard clean.
Evening rain left ETU ambulance bay slippery. Please mop urgently and place wet floor signs as stretchers are moving through.
Muddy footprints on Stairwell 2 after early showers. Quick clean needed before shift change rush.
Water dripping in OPD pharmacy corridor after thunder shower. Request containment, mopping, and caution boards till engineering arrives.
Yellow clinical waste bins overfilled; sharps mistakenly in general bin during surge. Need urgent segregation and pickup.
Post-emergency C-section theatre has blood spills on floor and scrub area. Require terminal clean before next case.
Returned linen stock feels damp; humidity increased with evening rain. Please re-dry or rewash and check store ventilation.
OPD public toilets heavily soiled; handwash empty. Need deep clean and restock before afternoon clinic.
Isolation cubicle vomitus on floor; soiled linen bag full. Request biohazard clean with 0.5% chlorine and immediate linen change.
Rainwater tracked on veranda and play area during visiting hours. Need continuous mopping and wet floor signage.
Temporary biomedical waste bay shows mixed general and yellow bags after downpour. Please re-segregate, relabel, and move to central store.
Two OR gowns returned from laundry with visible stains. Request rewash and check wash cycle logs.
Dust accumulation on ceiling vents and light fittings over beds 3-4. Please schedule high-dusting after hours.
Full linen skip left in corridor outside Ward 5, obstructing trolley movement. Remove and sanitize floor area.
OPD ramp muddy after early drizzle. Need machine scrub or thorough mopping before queues form.
Between cases, blood splashes on floor and backsplash at scrub sink. Immediate clean and fresh sterile drapes requested.
